programme.desc: To impress a potential love interest, Kyra enters her dog in an agility contest. The problem is that she doesn't have a dog, so she needs to find (and train) one, and quickly.

programme.title: Romance to the rescue
programme.desc: To impress a potential love interest, Kyra enters her dog in an agility contest. The problem is that she doesn't have a dog, so she needs to find (and train) one, and quickly.

programme.title: How to Kill Your Husband
programme.desc: Nancy Crampton-Brophy, known for writing about homicides and tumultuous relationships, fantasies about killing or running away from her husband, and even faking her own death, was arrested in 2022 for murdering her husband.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: After his father's death, Shaun must deal with the consequences that his intimacy with Lea will have on his relationship with Carly. The team operates on a patient who refuses to receive anesthesia during surgery because he is afraid of a relapse.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Doctors treat a 25-year-old runner who is suffering from severe swelling. Dr. Shaun Murphy and Dr. Carly Lever work in private.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: A devastating discovery forces the sisters to confront a truth that proves their entire lives were built on a lie.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: Sandokan, in command of his crew, boards a ship to steal its cargo and frees a Dayak prisoner. The man is convinced that Sandokan is the warrior foretold by an ancient prophecy, but Sandokan pays no attention to this.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: Marianne celebrates her 21st birthday. Both Sandokan and Brooke are invited to the dance. There is some tension between the three, but Sandokan must first free Yanez and his crew.

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: The tension between Halit and Nadir explodes after a public gesture involving Yildiz. As Ender finds herself caught between dangerous alliances, personal conflicts threaten to destroy everything.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Halit uncovers a betrayal that pits Yildiz against Ender, while Sahika moves her pieces to gain power. Alliances are broken, and the conflict between everyone becomes irreversible.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: As Halit escalates his war against Nadir, Sahika executes a dangerous plan that puts Yigit at the center of the conflict. Ender tries to protect his son as tensions rise in every family.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Ender and Yildiz try to trap Sahika using Nadir, while tension grows in Kaya's house. Between mistakes and suspicions, an unexpected error complicates plans even further.

programme.title: My Girlfriend Has Amnesia
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a marine biologist from Hawaii, finds every excuse not to commit to the women he dates. However, when he meets the woman of his dreams, the charming Lucy Whitmore, he also discovers a problem for the relationship: when Lucy gets up in the morning, she loses her memory.

programme.title: On the Edge of 18
programme.desc: Growing up isn't easy for some, like for Nadine, a student who has to deal with the fact that her best friend is dating her older brother. Nadine feels more alone than ever, until she meets a young man who gives her all his attention.

programme.title: Evening Program
programme.desc: When the mythical host of a famous talk show, Katherine Newbury, is accused of not contributing to the female cause because she only works with men, she hires Molly, an inexperienced young woman of Indian origin to collaborate on the program.

programme.title: So it's complicated
programme.desc: Nancy, a 34-year-old woman, tired of the countless dates her friends arrange for her, stumbles upon a 40-year-old divorcee - Jack. He mistakes her for her 24-year-old blind date and Nancy decides to pretend and continue with that story.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN DINARD. The resort of Dinard rolls out the red carpet for its British film festival when they discover the body of a young English director floating in the water. The man didn't drown, he was murdered.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN FINISTÈRE. Back in her native Brittany, Morgane Ledantec, captain of the Gendarmerie, is confronted with the discovery of human bones after a sacred oak tree fell during a storm.

programme.title: Fallen Angels Club: Heroes and Villains
programme.desc: Members of the Fallen Angels Murder Club search for answers about the mysterious death of one of their own. Hollis finds himself at the center of the investigation when a journalist covering the case also turns up dead.

programme.title: Everything We Had
programme.desc: A mother struggles to provide a better life for her daughter.

programme.title: Fallen Angels Club: Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Ex-convict and aspiring lawyer Hollis Morgan becomes the target of police investigation when a member of her book club is found murdered.

programme.title: Fallen Angels Club: Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Ex-convict and aspiring lawyer Hollis Morgan becomes the target of police investigation when a member of her book club is found murdered.

programme.title: Professor Baldas
programme.desc: Elizabeth Halsey is a teacher who doesn't give up. She is foul-mouthed, cruel and inappropriate and can't wait to marry a rich man so she can stop working. When she meets the new substitute teacher, handsome and rich, she does everything to seduce him!

programme.title: An English Estate
programme.desc: Los Angeles. Promising architect Nora Cartwright's life is about to change. First, she realizes that both her boyfriend Daniel and she are too engaged in their respective careers to be available for a relationship and ends up breaking up.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Halit uncovers a betrayal that pits Yildiz against Ender, while Sahika moves her pieces to gain power. Alliances are broken, and the conflict between everyone becomes irreversible.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: As Halit escalates his war against Nadir, Sahika executes a dangerous plan that puts Yigit at the center of the conflict. Ender tries to protect his son as tensions rise in every family.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Ender and Yildiz try to trap Sahika using Nadir, while tension grows in Kaya's house. Between mistakes and suspicions, an unexpected error complicates plans even further.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Halit accuses Ender of treason after missing key evidence against Nadir, while Yildiz becomes embroiled in the conflict. At the same time, the relationship between Yigit and Lila deteriorates again and triggers new consequences.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Andreina feels neglected by Vittorio, who is too busy organizing the Albini dress show.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: The Guarnieri family awaits news about the condition of Riccardo who, after the accident, is at risk of having to say goodbye to the ride.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Filiz tries to get pregnant, but all her attempts are unsuccessful and she tries everything to have a baby. On the other hand, Pelinsu and Onur are moving towards marriage.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Onur thinks the right thing to do is to marry Lale and agrees to marry on one condition... But Lale doesn't want to get married. In the end, what will Lale's decision be?

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Onur is really determined to get married, but Lale remains reluctant. It's up to Onur to convince her and, finally, Lale agrees to think about this hypothesis... at least. But what will be your final decision?

programme.title: Bridget Jones's New Diary
programme.sub-title: Bridget, a clumsy and complex journalist, suspects the infidelity of her partner with whom she has been in a relationship for just
programme.desc: Finally, Bridget found love with Mark, who is caring and dedicated. But Bridget can't help but feel jealous when Mark has a stunning new intern. To complicate matters, Daniel, the former boss, is returning...

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: Why complicate things when you can keep having fun every night at the club? That seems to be the motto of three friends: Christina, Courtney and Jane. Until one night Christina meets the ideal man who then disappears.

programme.title: ABC of Seduction
programme.desc: Abby is young, beautiful and a television producer, but her love life is a disaster and everyone knows it. When Mike Chadway is hired to spice up Abby's show, the seeds are sown for a battle of the sexes the likes of which haven't been seen in a long time...

programme.title: Godfather... But little
programme.desc: Tom is a catcher, very successful with women, and knows he can always count on Hannah, his best friend. But upon learning that Hannah is engaged, Tom realizes that he loves her. Invited to be “bridesmaid”, he accepts... - only to try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN LÉRINS ISLAND. On the Lérins Islands, Christophe Beaumont, a film producer, is found dead on the set of the film adapted from the legend of the Iron Mask. Laure Castaldi, responsible for the investigation, is surprised to find her sister Manon at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN LE MANS. Shortly after the start of the first qualifications for the 24 Hours of Le Mans, the body of a driver is discovered on the track. This was done deliberately. Captain Sabrina Nedjard is responsible for the investigation.

programme.title: Romeo + Juliet
programme.desc: In this adaptation by Baz Luhrmann, William Shakespeare's classic love story moves from the Middle Ages to the futuristic city of Verona Beach. There, Romeo and Juliet fall in love and experience the love of a lifetime.

programme.title: Red Love
programme.desc: After moving into her new home, Gia Summers forms an unexpected friendship with her neighbor, Jim Dunlap, a firefighter and single father, whose love of barbecue is matched only by Gia's passion for cooking.

programme.title: The truth about Charlie
programme.desc: Regina is thinking about divorcing Charlie. When she returns to Paris after her vacation in Martinique, her husband has been murdered and her checking account and home have been looted. Three of Charlie's former friends pursue her to recover money that she knows nothing about and the police see her as the main suspect. Her situation is increasingly dangerous and confusing, as she also has to face her feelings for Joshua, whom she met in Martinique.

programme.title: The mask of Zorro
programme.desc: 1821. The Mexican army strives to liberate its country from the Spanish yoke. In the Californias area, the evil Spanish governor, Don Rafael Montero, is about to lose everything. In a last attempt to catch his nemesis, the masked swordsman "Zorro", Montoro prepares to murder three innocents. With the help of two orphans, Joaquín and Alejandro Murrieta, Zorro frees the prisoners. Then he will give both boys a special medallion and flee on his horse, Tornado, after marking Montero with a small "Z" on his neck as a warning. But that same night the soldiers enter the house of a nobleman named Don Diego de la Vega and arrest him since they are convinced that he is the real Zorro. Don Diego's wife dies, he is locked up in prison and his daughter, Elena, is taken to Spain as Montoro's daughter, where he will raise her as if she were his own. Twenty years later, Montoro secretly returns to California and looks for Diego in prison but cannot find him because he is unrecognizable due to age. However, the prisoner does remember the man and with a thirst for revenge like he had never had before, he escapes from prison and decides to put an end to his enemy forever. Along the way he will discover Elena, his daughter, who is as beautiful as her mother when she was murdered. Tired, old and completely destroyed by the years of captivity, Don Diego de la Vega will decide to train an adult Alejandro Muerrieta, now a bandit and rogue, to become the new Zorro and avenge all the suffering that the evil Rafael Montero caused him. At first Anthony Hopkins rejected the role of Don Diego de la Vega because he had unbearable pain in his back. When a laser operation managed to alleviate the problem, he then offered to accept playing the wise old "Zorro."

programme.title: The legend of Zorro
programme.desc: 1850. California has been tortured by the colonizers for years but will finally become the thirty-first state of the Union. Zorro suspects that a group of individuals intend to sabotage this decision for their own benefit, so he will stop them in a heroic feat. At the same time, McGivens, a French baron, is dedicated to blackmailing the inhabitants of California to keep their lands and leaving those who earned their living from the countryside in absolute poverty. Don Alejandro de la Vega, the one nicknamed "Zorro" with his mask, his sword, his horse and his cape, has finally been able to marry the beautiful Elena and has a ten-year-old son named Joaquín. The little boy misses his father, whom he hardly sees, and on the other hand idealizes the figure of his hero, Zorro, without knowing what his true identity is. Alejandro promises to leave the mask behind forever and dedicate himself to his family, but when a new crisis appears in California, he acts once again to solve it. Elena, feeling cheated, kicks her husband out of the house and presents him with divorce papers. At that moment, an old companion of the woman arrives at the scene: the French aristocrat Army. When he finds out about Elena's separation, he immediately begins to court her while attending to his affairs in the secret brotherhood in which he is involved. Now Alejandro will have to choose between alleviating the suffering of the oppressed or returning to his family. But to do so he must defeat the always shady Baron Army. For "The Legend of Zorro" both Steven Spielberg and Robert Rodriguez planned to direct the film, but in the end they did not take the job, although Spielberg did stay on as executive producer.

programme.title: A doctor in the countryside
programme.desc: After 30 years working as the only doctor in a small village in a rural area of ​​southern France, Jean-Pierre falls ill. Health problems remove the doctor who attended, cured and cared for his neighbors from the profession 365 days a year and at any time. That is why it is necessary for another person to move in to replace him during sick leave. At that moment, Nathalie, a young doctor who has just finished her residency and who also has extensive experience as a nurse, arrives in the village. She will be in charge of helping Pierre with his work when he can't, but it will be a professional challenge because she has never worked in a medical office in a small town. In this way, it will also be complicated for Jean-Pierre because for him his work is the most important thing, so he will have to learn to deal with his new partner.

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz
programme.desc: Frank Morris, a prisoner specialized in escapes with a very high intelligence quotient, is imprisoned in Alcatraz prison. In his head he keeps preparing an escape plan that will not be risk-free.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Peter Parker and Mary Jane are finally together. They have both been able to accept their feelings and start a relationship. Mary Jane has landed a great role on Broadway and Peter continues to put on the Spiderman suit, helping those in need and capturing the city's criminals. Life seems to smile at them, even though their friend Harry continues to blame Peter for his father's death. But this is not the only threat that looms over the protagonists. An alien entity with symbiotic and violent behavior has arrived on Earth. Peter comes into contact with it, but even though his powers seem to increase when it envelops him, Peter realizes the dangers it poses and gets rid of it. The alien possesses Eddie Brocks, giving rise to a new and feared villain called Venom. At the same time, another villain begins to operate in the city, Sandman. Finally, Venom and Sandman kidnap Mary Jane and Spiderman must save her with the help of an unexpected ally. Director Sam Raimi was against the appearance of the Venom character in his film due to the character's lack of humanity. But producer Avi Arad convinced him that he had a large group of followers who read his stories in the Spider-Man comics and that he should appear. Topher Grace's performance definitely convinced him of Venom's appearance in this third installment of the saga. It took three years to make the special effects related to Sandman's powers, many experiments were carried out to analyze the behavior of the sand and digitally imitate it on the big screen.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: force team
programme.desc: With the American football league very advanced and the possibility of reaching the finals, the Washington Sentinels players decide to go on strike. To solve such a delicate situation, the team owner hires legendary coach Jimmy McGinty and proposes an almost impossible challenge: recruit a team of substitutes in one week. Once the first step is taken, you will have to face an even more difficult mission; coach this peculiar group of unknown and somewhat "losing" players, led by Shane Falco.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: In 1970, the Apollo 13 spacecraft makes one of many routine trips through space towards the Moon. Astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert, who were supposed to fly on Apollo 14, are relegated to this mission that is unimportant in popular opinion. Everything changes when the ship is already outside the Earth, heading towards the Moon, and an explosion inside the space module threatens the entire crew. This is the mission that made famous the phrase 'Houston, we have a problem' and tells the story of how the astronauts did everything possible to survive, at the same time that, from Earth, NASA workers tried to plan a strategy to bring their men back home. To achieve true weightlessness, the cast and crew flew in NASA's KC-135 plane, nicknamed 'The Vomit Comet.' Some of the scenes in which the Earth can be seen from the windows of Apollo 13, the images of the planet are photographs taken by astronauts Jim Lovell and Bill Anders on the Apollo 8 mission. In the original recording of the real Apollo 13 mission, the phrase Lovell pronounces is not 'Houston, we have a problem', but rather 'Ahh, Houston, we have had a problem.' According to the director, Ron Howard, that phrase indicated that the problem had already passed, so he decided to change it to the present, so that the tension would not decrease. Actor Brad Pitt had the opportunity to participate in this film, but he turned down the job to play the protagonist of 'Seven'.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of the book "Playing the enemy" by John Carlin. In 1990 Nelson Mandela became President of his country, after having been released from prison. One of his most important measures was the abolition of apartheid. He intended to achieve reconciliation between the black and white populations. It was in 1995 when he used the Rugby World Cup in South Africa as an instrument to achieve national unity.

programme.title: Hilo mortal
programme.desc: A new explosive, whose color and taste are like water, threatens American politicians. The problem lies in the impossibility of analyzing the remains of the explosive material.

programme.title: elite mercenaries
programme.desc: Billionaire technology CEO Donovan Chalmers hires a group of deadly mercenaries to protect a piece of technology that, if exposed, could destroy the world. Their mission becomes even more risky when Chalmers' daughter is kidnapped by the dangerous terrorist group 'The Pardoners', who will stop at nothing to obtain the valuable and dangerous technology.

programme.title: Beauty and the beast
programme.desc: Adaptation of the story of Beauty and the Beast. When Bella's father is shipwrecked, she is exiled to the countryside. The land belongs to the kingdom of the Beast, from whom he steals a rose and is sentenced to death. Belle sacrifices herself for her father and goes to live in Beast's castle. There he will investigate the secrets that surround its owner and discover that he was a prince. True love will arise between them without expecting it.

programme.title: The truth about Charlie
programme.desc: Regina is thinking about divorcing Charlie. When she returns to Paris after her vacation in Martinique, her husband has been murdered and her checking account and home have been looted. Three of Charlie's former friends pursue her to recover money that she knows nothing about and the police see her as the main suspect. Her situation is increasingly dangerous and confusing, as she also has to face her feelings for Joshua, whom she met in Martinique.

programme.title: Superpoli in Las Vegas
programme.desc: Paul Blart is a security guard who must travel to Las Vegas to supervise a Security Guard Exhibition, and he takes the opportunity to take his daughter, Maya, before she goes to study abroad. What Paul did not expect is that some criminals commit a robbery in the middle of the exhibition, having to demonstrate what he has learned in his training.

programme.title: The mask of Zorro

In a last attempt to catch his nemesis, the masked swordsman "Zorro", Montoro prepares to murder three innocents. However, the prisoner does remember the man and with a thirst for revenge like he had never had before, he escapes from prison and decides to put an end to his enemy forever. Along the way he will discover Elena, his daughter, who is as beautiful as her mother when she was murdered. Tired, old and completely destroyed by the years of captivity, Don Diego de la Vega will decide to train an adult Alejandro Muerrieta, now a bandit and rogue, to become the new Zorro and avenge all the suffering that the evil Rafael Montero caused him. At first Anthony Hopkins rejected the role of Don Diego de la Vega because he had unbearable pain in his back. When a laser operation managed to alleviate the problem, he then offered to accept playing the wise old "Zorro."

programme.title: The legend of Zorro
programme.desc: 1850. California has been tortured by the colonizers for years but will finally become the thirty-first state of the Union. Zorro suspects that a group of individuals intend to sabotage this decision for their own benefit, so he will stop them in a heroic feat. At the same time, McGivens, a French baron, is dedicated to blackmailing the inhabitants of California to keep their lands and leaving those who earned their living from the countryside in absolute poverty. Don Alejandro de la Vega, the one nicknamed "Zorro" with his mask, his sword, his horse and his cape, has finally been able to marry the beautiful Elena and has a ten-year-old son named Joaquín. The little boy misses his father, whom he hardly sees, and on the other hand idealizes the figure of his hero, Zorro, without knowing what his true identity is. Alejandro promises to leave the mask behind forever and dedicate himself to his family, but when a new crisis appears in California, he acts once again to solve it. Elena, feeling cheated, kicks her husband out of the house and presents him with divorce papers. At that moment, an old companion of the woman arrives at the scene: the French aristocrat Army. When he finds out about Elena's separation, he immediately begins to court her while attending to his affairs in the secret brotherhood in which he is involved. Now Alejandro will have to choose between alleviating the suffering of the oppressed or returning to his family. But to do so he must defeat the always shady Baron Army. For "The Legend of Zorro" both Steven Spielberg and Robert Rodriguez planned to direct the film, but in the end they did not take the job, although Spielberg did stay on as executive producer.

programme.title: No reservations
programme.desc: Kate Armstrong is a brilliant and demanding haute cuisine chef in charge of a famous restaurant. Her perfectionist and meticulous nature means that she does not accept criticism very well, which causes her boss to force her to go to therapy if she wants to continue maintaining her position as a chef. After the tragic death of her sister in a car accident, Kate is forced to take care of Zoe, her 9-year-old niece who has just been orphaned. Her new family situation causes Kate to face real problems reconciling her work day with taking care of Zoe, so her boss decides to give her a few days of vacation so she can adapt to the changes. After a few days of rest, Kate returns to work with more strength. However, upon her arrival the chef meets Nick Palmer, a chef who likes to take risks and bet on new ideas and who has been hired to replace her in her absence. The restaurant manager is delighted with Nick, so she decides to make him a permanent part of the staff, which will cause Kate to feel threatened. Rivalry will arise between both chefs due to their totally opposite characters and their different ways of working. Little by little, Kate and Nick will transform their rivalry into love, a process in which little Zoe will have a lot to do with.

programme.title: Love without an appointment
programme.desc: Romantic comedy from film director Ben Palmer, who focuses especially on directing television series, including "The Inbetweeners" and "Comedy Lab." Nancy is a thirty-four-year-old woman who spends another day of being hungover, tired of not having a partner and still being single at her age. Her group of friends try to advise her to find someone, but she is not up to the task and does not always listen to them. His parents have had a very different story from his and they enjoy the happiest and most perfect relationship. When Nancy heads through the streets of London on her way to her parents' anniversary, she can't imagine that she will meet someone who will change her destiny forever: Jack. Jack is a forty-year-old divorced man who mistakes her for his blind date, a girl ten years younger than Nancy. She takes advantage of the opportunity presented to her and pretends to be his blind date, thus beginning one of the craziest trips of her life with an unknown man with whom she soon hits it off. Nancy ends up thinking that Jack is the perfect boyfriend for her, but he keeps thinking that he is who he really is not. Lake Bell, the actress who plays Nancy in the film, used a British accent throughout filming, even when they were not filming, so the entire crew assumed that the actress was British and did not find out the truth until the end of filming. The film was shot entirely in the United Kingdom, with the majority of scenes in recording studios.

programme.title: It happened in Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa Ventura is a single, hard-working, intelligent and determined mother who dreams of achieving a better life. While she works hard as a cleaning lady in a luxurious Manhattan hotel, her heart falls in love with Christopher Marshall, a rising politician who, upon seeing her, mistakes her for one of the hotel's high-society guests.

programme.title: The President and Miss Wade
programme.desc: Andrew Shepherd (Michael Douglas), president of the United States and widower for just over a year, begins a romance with Sydney Wade (Annette Benning), a consultant for an important environmental organization. This relationship, in the middle of the election campaign, will be taken advantage of by Bob Rumson (Richard Dreyfuss), the opposing candidate, to attack the president.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Natalie Cook, Dylan Sanders and Alex Munday are three special agents with overwhelming fighting and combat capabilities. But although each one is very different from the others, they will all be hired by a man named Charlie to carry out a special and very dangerous mission: find Eric Knox, a computer genius kidnapped because of his latest invention: an incredibly precise voice scanner. Through their investigations, Natalie, Dylan and Alex will discover clues that will lead them across the entire world, exuding charm and femininity to achieve their goals and destroying anyone who gets in their way. Drew Barrymore was a huge fan of the "Harry Potter" phenomenon, going so far as to read small parts of the different books to the members of the recording crew and the other actors. At the beginning of the film, when she is seen with glasses and black hair before being hired, she is also reading a Harry Potter book.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: The Edge
programme.desc: Second part of Charlie's Angels. Dylan, Natalie and Alex are sent by their boss on a new mission: locate a group of rings that have been stolen from the Department of Justice. This device allows its owner to know the list of people who are in the FBI's Witness Protection Program. When the first witnesses begin to appear dead, the Angels will have to use all their ingenuity to solve the case. An exceptional cameo can be seen in this film: one of the original Angels, Jaclyn Smith.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner is a renowned scientist, with a murky family past, who suffers with his team a serious laboratory accident in which everyone is exposed to intense gamma radiation. When he discovers that he is the only one who has survived, he is confused and begins to investigate. But Bruce has developed a terrible ability after the accident that could hinder the investigation; when he gets angry he turns into a giant green monster with irrational and destructive behavior. To create the Hulk character using digital technology, the company Light & Magic made the largest technical deployment in its history. It was necessary to work together with one hundred and eighty ILM technicians and work on the character for more than a year and a half. Even so, there are viewers who have compared the technical quality of the Hulk to that of Shrek. In this film, Hulk reaches the largest size he had reached to date, nine meters tall. Ang Lee used the split-screen technique to cinematically imitate the panels of a comic book page. To do this, he had to shoot the same scene several times, which somewhat exhausted actor Eric Bana, who plays Brece Banner. Much of the microbiology work seen on screen is real, done by Ang Lee's wife.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Running at full speed around the track, doing everything around, over and through the competition. Speed ​​Racer is a born racer, born to drive racing cars. Speed ​​is aggressive, instinctive and, above all, reckless. His only competition is the memory of his brother, his idol, the legendary Rex Racer, whose death in a race has left a goal that Speed ​​feels the need to fulfill. Speed ​​feels a great loyalty to the family racing business run by his father, Pops Racer, the designer of the powerful Mach 5 car he pilots. When Speed ​​rejects a very lucrative and tempting offer from Royalton Industries, he not only angers the company's maniacal owner but also discovers a terrible secret: some of the most important races are being manipulated by a handful of heartless businessmen who manipulate the most important drivers to get more money. If Speed ​​does not drive for Royalton's team, Royalton will ensure that the Mach 5 never crosses the finish line. The only way Speed ​​can save his family's business and the sport he loves is to beat Royalton at its own game. With the support of his family and his loyal girlfriend, Trixie, Speed ​​teams up with his former rival, the mysterious Racer X, to win the race that killed his brother: the death-defying cross-country rally.

programme.title: The flight
programme.desc: Commander Whip Whitaker is forced to make an emergency landing of the aircraft he is piloting, thereby saving many lives. He is considered a hero, until the subsequent investigation reveals that he had used narcotics the night before the incident. The pilot faces a trial in which he must put his career and his own life in order.

programme.title: Beauty and the beast
programme.desc: Adaptation of the story of Beauty and the Beast. When Bella's father is shipwrecked, she is exiled to the countryside. The land belongs to the kingdom of the Beast, from whom he steals a rose and is sentenced to death. Belle sacrifices herself for her father and goes to live in Beast's castle. There he will investigate the secrets that surround its owner and discover that he was a prince. True love will arise between them without expecting it.

programme.title: Shopping center superpoli
programme.desc: Paul Blart is a single father trying to make a living as a security officer at a shopping center. When a robbery closes the doors of the center, the security officer will have to become a real police officer.

programme.title: Superpoli in Las Vegas
programme.desc: Paul Blart is a security guard who must travel to Las Vegas to supervise a Security Guard Exhibition, and he takes the opportunity to take his daughter, Maya, before she goes to study abroad. What Paul did not expect is that some criminals commit a robbery in the middle of the exhibition, having to demonstrate what he has learned in his training.

programme.title: Haute couture
programme.desc: Esther, first seamstress at the House of Dior, works on her latest Haute Couture collection, before retiring. Jade, a 20-year-old girl, steals her purse on the subway. Days later, repentant, she decides to go and return it. Esther decides to offer him a chance.

programme.title: The jury
programme.desc: A young New Orleans widow files a civil lawsuit against a powerful corporate consortium whom she blames for her husband's death. Thus, a multimillion-dollar case is launched. Judicial thriller based on a novel by John Grisham, a best-selling writer who is well versed in all the ins and outs of United States law.

programme.title: Essence of woman
programme.desc: Remake of the film 'Scent of a Woman', from 1974. Charlie is a young man who studies at a private school thanks to a scholarship. In order to get some money, he works on weekends. One day, he becomes the guide for a rude retired colonel who suffers from blindness and is ready to commit suicide. Little by little, the cold relationship between the two grows closer into a beautiful friendship that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: A doctor in the countryside
programme.desc: After 30 years working as the only doctor in a small village in a rural area of ​​southern France, Jean-Pierre falls ill. Health problems remove the doctor who attended, cured and cared for his neighbors from the profession 365 days a year and at any time. That is why it is necessary for another person to move in to replace him during sick leave. At that moment, Nathalie, a young doctor who has just finished her residency and who also has extensive experience as a nurse, arrives in the village. She will be in charge of helping Pierre with his work when he can't, but it will be a professional challenge because she has never worked in a medical office in a small town. In this way, it will also be complicated for Jean-Pierre because for him his work is the most important thing, so he will have to learn to deal with his new partner.

programme.title: The Scholar
programme.desc: Young Jules runs a very successful online fashion business. As part of a new job program, you will have to agree to hire the elderly Ben as a senior intern. You will soon realize that your experience and attitude can be very important to the company.

programme.title: The silence of the lambs
programme.desc: Promising FBI agent Clarice Starling is pulled from her special forces training by Jack Crawford of the FBI's Behavioral Study Unit. He wants me to study a notorious eccentric psychopath named Habbibal Lecter, who was a forensic psychiatrist imprisoned for multiple murders and cannibalism. The purpose of the meetings between Clarice and Hannibal must be for the latter to agree to help her catch a serial killer named Buffalo Bill. But what the woman did not imagine was that Hannibal would turn out to be a sophisticated and cultured man restricted from others by glass walls. Although he is polite at first, he soon begins to lose patience when Clarice tries to create a psychological profile for him. While the hunts continue throughout Chicago and Buffalo Bill collects his kills without the FBI being able to do anything to solve it, Clarice will have to find a way to ingratiate herself with a man who ate the people around him and show him that, in addition to being intelligent, she is not afraid of him at all. Things will start to get difficult when the Senator's daughter disappears and everything indicates that Buffalo Bill has her and that soon her body will appear as a new victim. The events of this film take place after what happened in the film Hunter (1986). Although there are many characters in common in the two films, only two of the actors share films. Frankie Faison plays Lt. Fisk in Hunter and Barney in The Silence of the Lambs; On the other hand, Dan Butler plays the fingerprint expert FBI agent in Hunter and an entomologist in "The Silence of the Lambs."

programme.title: natural born killers
programme.desc: Mickey and Mallory are two young people who, in love and maddened, murder the girl's father in cold blood and begin a flight. The host of a sensationalist program decides to take advantage of the fascination that his personality exerts on the public to turn the murderers into television heroes.

programme.title: The President's Path
programme.desc: Caitríona Perry is joined by White House reporter Bernd Buzman and CBS News political director Fin Gomez to unpack the memorandum of understanding with Iran, signed with a flourish by President Trump before G7 leaders at Versailles. With a 60-day clock now running toward bigger talks, they ask what America has actually gained - given the Strait of Hormuz was open and petrol cheaper before Operation Epic Fury began. The team digs into the unresolved nuclear question, the daunting task of diluting Iran's enriched uranium on a timeline that took the Obama administration 20 months, and the politics driving it all: JD Vance positioning himself as the face of the deal, midterm pressures and an uneasy MAGA base. They also weigh a renewed push on Ukraine, rumours swirling around Cuba, and a strikingly public rift between Trump and Netanyahu. Could the flashpoint in Lebanon yet unravel the whole Iran deal?

programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Shiona McCallum visits Fifa HQ in Zurich to see some of the latest tech being used in the World Cup. Martin Sharkey explores how changes in the way we watch content are shaping new technologies. Paul Carter hits the racetrack to see if AI technology systems can make journeys safer, and Andrew Rogers meets the dogs being helped to walk and run again thanks to assistive mobility aids.

programme.title: BBC News

programme.title: China's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: Across the world, fashion is a fundamental expression of who we are. Today, people in China are rediscovering the beauty of their extraordinarily rich clothing heritage. In this programme, Alastair discovers how historic fashion design still resonates with people in China today, and how it has become a way in which people can celebrate their identity.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: World Questions
programme.desc: A special edition of World Questions, putting young Moroccan women at the centre of a national debate about rights, faith and family law reform. Jonny Dymond chairs a panel of feminist activists and conservatives as they debate issues such as child marriage, sex outside marriage, inheritance, harassment and polygamy. As a new generation pushes for change, Morocco stands out in the Muslim world, with reform being debated openly, and this programme hears from young women at a pivotal moment in civil society.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: Following the sentencing of 13 people for violent disorder during protests in Southampton, attention has turned to the role of content creators who film demonstrations and public disorder. The judge cited the usefulness of footage filmed by so-called 'citizen journalists'. Siddharth Venkataramakrishnan of the Institute for Strategic Dialogue and content creator Wesley Winter give their perspective on the issue. The BBC has begun setting out changes as part of plans to deliver significant savings across the organisation. The measures include the closure of several programmes across radio and current affairs output, alongside wider reductions in staffing. Jonathan Munro, global director of BBC News, outlines the changes. Norma Percy has spent years getting to the heart of some of the biggest moments in recent history. Her documentaries have been celebrated for talking directly to the people who made the decisions. As the BBC airs her latest film - about Brexit - she reflects on her storied career and the future of documentary-making.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: Train enthusiast Francis Bourgeois travels to Malaysia to explore a railway network dating back 140 years. Jumping on board the iconic Jungle Railway, he experiences one of Southeast Asia's most spectacular train journeys, before arriving in the bustling capital city, Kuala Lumpur, and finishing up on Penang Island for their spectacular Lunar New Year celebrations. En route he joins forces with some of Malaysia's train devotees, finding a shared and nostalgic affection for the country's older, and less common freight trains.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: Young people were told artificial intelligence would make them sharper, faster, more creative - and more employable. But for many, that promise now feels more complicated. From students leaning on chatbots to write essays to graduates sending out hundreds of AI-assisted job applications - only to be filtered out by algorithms on the other side - artificial intelligence is no longer a future story. Join AI Decoded as we ask: Is AI empowering the next generation - or quietly undermining it?

programme.title: Talking Movies
programme.desc: One of the fastest growing sectors in tourism, both in the UK and globally, is being driven by people visiting locations that have been featured in films. In a special edition Talking Movies investigates the booming film tourism business also known as 'set jetting'. In London, Tom Brook joins a James Bond walking tour visiting key locations used in 007 films and talks to people helping to attract visitors through the capital's cinematic history. In Austria, the 1965 classic The Sound of Music brings in an estimated 300,000 visitors each year. Tom joins a group of fans who burst into spontaneous renditions of the musical's beloved songs as they travel through Salzburg's streets. The Oscar-winning picture Anora set in and around Brighton Beach in New York has resulted in a whole new wave of tourists visiting this Russian speaking community. We see some key locations used in the movie and hear from the picture's celebrated director Sean Baker on why he wanted to shoot there. And Tom visits the French town of Dinard which capitalises on movie tourism through its annual film festival in Northern France.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Unspun World with John Simpson
programme.desc: This week John Simpson, in discussion with the BBC's unparalleled range of experts across the world, examines the new deal aimed at ending the war between the US and Iran, analyses Ukraine's bid to join the European Union and looks at the worsening situation for women in Afghanistan under Taliban rule.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Giving birth in the UK is getting more dangerous; the number of women dying in childbirth is up 20% in the last ten years. Now, in Nottingham, the largest-ever maternity inquiry is underway, reviewing the medical records of thousands of births for signs of avoidable harm. Reporting for Panorama, Michael Buchanan hears powerful testimonies: from mothers who weren’t listened to, staff who blew the whistle but were ignored, and from parents whose babies’ tragic deaths were dismissed as ‘just bad luck’. The programme also hears from the new chief executive of the Nottingham University Hospitals NHS Trust, who has promised change. As families unite to demand answers, Panorama investigates how systemic neglect, inadequate staffing and a reluctance to learn from mistakes have led to heartbreak.

Meet Love in the Online Shop
programme.desc: Rayya adalah mahasiswa yang menekuni bisnis online. Dia mendapat saingan yaitu Pras, teman kampusnya yang juga punya bisnis toko online. Setelah kalah bersaing, Pras bekerja untuk Rayya, dan mereka saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Kr. Amat Tikar Rogosukmo Shop
programme.desc: Tikar Rogo Sukmo adalah selembar tikar yang bisa menyembuhkan orang sakit. Tikar ini bukanlah tikar sembarangan. Setiap orang yang sembuh setelah memakainya akan langsung dengan sukarela memberikan seluruh hartanya.

programme.title: Married Failed
programme.desc: Jack, pencuri yang sedang menjadi buron. Suatu ketika ia merampok sebuah rumah dan mengambil satu peti mewah. Ia mengira itu adalah peti yang memuat perhiasan serta uang banyak, namun ternyata isinya benar-benar di luar dugaan.

programme.title: Bangkitnya Rawa Rontek
programme.desc: Rontek, seorang pendekar jahat yang menguasai ilmu hitam bernama 'rawa rontek' yang bisa menjadikannya kebal. Suatu ketika Rontek harus menghadapi lawan tangguh yang memiliki ilmu 'pancasona'.

programme.title: Cincin Wali
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dari kota melihat gadis yang pernah ditemuinya dalam mimpi. Dia memutuskan untuk tinggal di pesantren yang sama dengan gadis tersebut. Namun, untuk mendapatkan gadis itu dia harus memperoleh cincin wali.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 2
programme.desc: Saat di rumah Ken, Mpok Yagi meminta izin pada Mama Ken untuk pulang kampung. Mada dan Ken berencana untuk ikut bersama Mpok Yagi. Di kampung Mpok Yagi inilah, diselenggarakan kompetisi silat.

programme.title: Petaka Topi Pemikat
programme.desc: Annisa kehilangan nenek yang merawatnya sejak kecil, ia difitnah para tetangga yang menuduhnya menjual rujak beracun. Kehidupan Annisa berubah saat mendapat topi pancar pesona dari toko KR. Amat.

programme.title: OMG Aku Cinta Kamu
programme.desc: Bella, pusing karena usahanya mengalami penurunan. Ini disebabkan oleh tukang cireng yang berjualan di samping toko miliknya. Ketika Bella ingin memarahi si penjual tersebut, dia justru terpukau oleh ketampanan penjual tersebut.

programme.title: Gold Teeth Girl Love
programme.desc: Kisah seorang perempuan muda bernama Gadis yang baru putus dengan pacarnya. Dia mengubah penampilannya yang culun dengan memakai gigi emas untuk mengejar cinta yang baru.

programme.title: Pacar Dari Langit
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya sakit. Mega terpaksa pulang ke kampung halaman dan jatuh cinta kepada alien bernama Zen. yang berjanji akan selalu menjaganya.

programme.title: Orang Sakti Penabur Cinta
programme.desc: Sakit hati karena cintanya, Rian bersumpah tidak akan ada lelaki lain yang bisa mendekati Intan. Intan yang putus asa meminta bantuan kepada orang sakti penabur cinta, namun ternyata orang tersebut tidak seperti yang diduganya.

programme.title: Pangeran Kodok
programme.desc: Joshua meminta nasihat pada Ki Abra yang memberinya mantra, namun mantra tersebut hanya bisa dipakai sekali dan tidak boleh salah ucap. Saat mencoba mantranya, Joshua melakukan kesalahan besar.

programme.title: Terperangkap Di Alas Roban
programme.desc: Saat pulang dari liburan, bus yang ditumpangi Muham dan temannya mogok tepat di tengah wilayah angker. Mereka menolong seorang gadis yang ternyata disandera makhluk misterius di sana.

programme.title: Manusia Ikan Jatuh Cinta
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya bangkrut, Risa terpaksa pindah ke sebuah kampung dekat laut. Di sana, saat dia nyaris tenggelam, tiba-tiba ada yang membawanya ke permukaan. Saat tersadar, dia hanya melihat sekilas manusia dengan sirip ikan.

programme.title: Cintaku Seluas TPU
programme.desc: Vita marah pada Ferly yang ketahuan selingkuh dengan Yoana. Vita mengebut dengan mobilnya dan hampir menabrak Abi. Di hari yang sama dia mendapat kabar kakeknya meninggal dan Vita di beri warisan lahan TPU.

programme.title: Pliss Gue Bukan Princess
programme.desc: Genta mengenalkan Alila, pacarnya, ke ibunya. Namun, Alila dianggap kurang feminin, sehingga ibu Genta memberi waktu agar Alila bisa berubah.

programme.title: Kalau Cinta Jangan Muna
programme.desc: Tito dan Erin sudah menjalin hubungan selama lima tahun. Erin ingin merayakan anniversary, namun tiba-tiba Tito memutuskan hubungan begitu saja tanpa alasan yang jelas. Keadaan berubah ketika Erin mengalami kecelakaan dan amnesia

programme.title: Kalau Cinta Jangan Muna
programme.desc: Tito dan Erin sudah menjalin hubungan selama lima tahun. Erin ingin merayakan anniversary, namun tiba-tiba Tito memutuskan hubungan begitu saja tanpa alasan yang jelas. Keadaan berubah ketika Erin mengalami kecelakaan dan amnesia

programme.title: Saat Teduh Bersama Gereja Mawar Sharon
Empress Wu
programme.desc: Wu Ze Tian adalah seorang selir Kaisar Tang yang berusia 14 tahun nan cantik dan berbakat. Ia menjadi biarawati usai sang kaisar meninggal, tapi ia memiliki dua putra dengan Kaisar Tang Gao Zong.

programme.title: Rolls, Rolls, I Love You
programme.desc: Tiga pemuda menyinggung seorang miliarder dan terlibat dalam taruhan yang tinggi. Jika menang, mereka bisa memiliki mobil Rolls Royce miliknya, tetapi mereka harus membayar lima puluh ribu dolar jika kalah!

programme.title: Love Without End
programme.desc: Penyanyi Qing Qing dan arsitek Tang Peng Nan adalah pasangan serasi. Ia mengorbankan dirinya untuk membantu Peng Nan pada saat keluarganya mengalami kesulitan. Namun, mereka putus karena kesalahpahaman.

programme.title: Pursuit Of Vengeance
programme.desc: Legenda Kung Fu Ti Lung membintangi film laga ini sebagai Fu Xue Hong, yang memulai perjalanan agar dapat membalas dendam untuk ayahnya.

programme.title: Return Of The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Film sekuel ini bercerita tentang imigran Yeh Feng yang kabur dari penjara untuk tinggal bersama paman Wang Sha yang jahat. Namun, ternyata kekasihnya, Ai Ti, telah menikah dengan seorang pria yang kasar.

programme.title: Heroes Of Sung
programme.desc: Dalam film kung fu klasik ini, Shih Zu, salah satu pahlawan wanita di perfilman laga Hong Kong, bekerjasama dengan Lo Lieh untuk menemukan dan melindungi segel kerajaan Dinasti Sung.

programme.title: Voyage Of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Kaisar Chien Lung melanjutkan penyamarannya ke Tiongkok Selatan. Ditemani oleh menteri dan sarjana kekaisaran, mereka memiliki banyak kejadian menarik di Yangzhou.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Dua pangeran berseteru memperebutkan takhta di Dinasti Qing. Bisakah wanita pembunuh yang terlibat dalam perseteruan kerajaan ini menjalankan misinya demi membantu salah satu pangeran mendapatkan takhta?

programme.title: Rose, Be My Love
programme.desc: Berlatar pada malam penyerbuan Jepang di Hong Kong, film tentang kisah cinta yang tragis produksi Shaw Brothers ini dibintangi oleh Li Ting dan Kwan Shan sebagai sepasang kekasih yang terpisahkan oleh perang.

programme.title: Gambler's Delight
programme.desc: Dalam film tentang perjudian ini, Danny Lee berperan sebagai seorang penjudi putus asa yang melakukan kecurangan saat berjudi di sebuah kasino di Makau. Ia pun harus menghadapi seorang pemimpin geng asal Jepang.

programme.title: Black Magic 2
programme.desc: Dokter Sing merasa bingung dengan gejala-gejala aneh yang dialami pasiennya dan meminta bantuan pada temannya. Penyakit tersebut rupanya disebabkan oleh ilmu hitam yang dilakukan oleh seorang pria jahat bernama Kong.

programme.title: Roving Swordsman
programme.desc: Sebuah klan jahat nan ambisius berniat untuk menguasai dunia seni bela diri. Untuk mencapai tujuan tersebut, mereka harus mencuri manuskrip seni bela diri rahasia yang menggambarkan cara membuat senjata api.

programme.title: Forbidden Tales Of Two Cities
programme.desc: Urusan asmara dan moral di era modern hanyalah segelintir masalah dari cerita yang berlatarkan Makau ini. Kisah cinta antara empat anak manusia menjadi cerita utama dalam kisah humor ini.

programme.title: Judgement Of An Assassin
programme.desc: Sebuah klan jahat merencanakan perselisihan untuk mendominasi dunia seni bela diri. Pembunuh bertopeng mereka membantai klan-klan lain dan salah satu pembunuh ditangkap dan diadili di pengadilan antarklan.

programme.title: The Singing Thief
programme.desc: Sutradara seni bela diri legendaris Chang Cheh mencoba peruntungannya dalam film musikal bersama penyanyi wanita asal Taiwan, Lin Chong, yang berperan sebagai pencuri permata yang berubah haluan menjadi penyanyi klub.

programme.title: The Singing Thief
programme.desc: Sutradara seni bela diri legendaris Chang Cheh mencoba peruntungannya dalam film musikal bersama penyanyi wanita asal Taiwan, Lin Chong, yang berperan sebagai pencuri permata yang berubah haluan menjadi penyanyi klub.

programme.title: No doubt Charn
programme.desc: Berlatar di masa Dinasti Han, sekelompok orang yang dipimpin oleh Yang Chi-ching dan Lin Dai, berupaya untuk memisahkan sang gubernur dengan putranya dan akhirnya menyebabkan mereka saling memusuhi.

programme.title: Mad Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: Seorang mantan ahli kung fu gaya monyet yang dikalahkan oleh seorang penjahat kejam diyakinkan oleh murid mudanya untuk mengajarinya kung fu gaya monyet demi membalas rasa malunya.

programme.title: My Name Ain't Suzie
programme.desc: Mei Li muda bekerja sebagai pelayan bar di Wanchai untuk mencari nafkah. Ia jatuh cinta pada Jimmy saat bertemu dengannya di sana. Namun, Mei Li merasa sangat terpukul saat Jimmy harus pergi.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: Guo Jing bertemu Huang Rong dan mereka jatuh cinta. Di saat yang sama, Ouyang Ke melamar Huang Rong, sehingga ayah Huang mengatur sebuah duel untuk kedua pria tersebut.

programme.title: The Human Goddess
programme.desc: Kisah cinta antara sesosok peri nan memikat yang turun dari surga untuk menjalani kehidupan di Hong Kong pada tahun 70-an dengan seorang pria yang mengelola sebuah panti asuhan yang terlilit hutang.

programme.title: The Magnificent Swordsman
programme.desc: The Magnificent Swordsman memusatkan pada sumpah seorang pahlawan untuk membalaskan dendam pada bandit-bandit jahat yang membunuh keluarganya saat ia masih kecil.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: The Water Margin karya sutradara Chang Cheh merupakan film seni bela diri paling epik, diangkat dari legenda nyata tentang 108 pemberontak yang hidup di gunung dan mampu berkali-kali mengalahkan serbuan tentara Sung.

programme.title: West Chamber
programme.desc: Kisah yang diangkat berdasarkan sebuah opera Tiongkok nan terkenal ini menceritakan seorang sarjana muda nan miskin bernama Zhang yang terpesona oleh Hong, putri dari keluarga berpengaruh yang ia temui di sebuah kuil.

programme.title: Brave Archer And His Mate
programme.desc: Guo Jing dan Huang Rong mengasuh putra saudara angkatnya Yang Kang dan memberinya nama Yang Gou. Demi mencegah Yan Gou membalas dendam atas kematian ayahnya, Huang Rong melarangnya mempelajari seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Cave Of Silken Web
programme.desc: Bagian ke-3 dari film Journey To The West produksi Shaw Brothers ini mengikuti perjuangan para jagoan kita saat dijebak oleh 7 siluman laba-laba penggoda, yang bertekad untuk meraih keabadian dengan memakan para biksu!

programme.title: Portrait In Crystal
programme.desc: Di film fantasi seni bela diri ini, jenderal Teng Wei Hao curiga bahwa sebuah lukisan kristal telah dikutuk dan menyebabkan beberapa pembunuhan. Ia mengutus anak buahnya untuk menyelidiki pencipta lukisan itu.

programme.title: Godfather Of Canton
programme.desc: Seorang komisaris ditangkap oleh utusan Cheng atas tuduhan korupsi dengan bantuan yang tak disengaja dari Lin. Saat bekerja untuk Cheng, Lin akhirnya mengetahui cara memperoleh uang suap dari Chang.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: Sebagai hukuman atas perilaku buruknya, putri Kaisar Jade yang ke-tujuh diusir dari surga dan dikirim untuk tinggal bersama manusia. Di sana, ia jatuh cinta dengan seorang pemuda desa bernama Dong Young.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: Sebagai hukuman atas perilaku buruknya, putri Kaisar Jade yang ke-tujuh diusir dari surga dan dikirim untuk tinggal bersama manusia. Di sana, ia jatuh cinta dengan seorang pemuda desa bernama Dong Young.

programme.title: Finger Of Doom
programme.desc: Misteri, horor dan seni bela diri bergabung dalam kisah supranatural tentang mantan pendekar pedang yang kini menjadi pembuat payung. Mereka harus menghadapi sosok jahat yang berpengaruh serta memiliki jari-jari ajaib.

programme.title: The Flying Dagger
programme.desc: Keluarga Yu dan klan Naga Hijau bermusuhan saat putri dari keluarga Yu membunuh putra kepala klan yang merupakan pemerkosa dan pembunuh. Pemimpin klan Naga Hijau melukai kepala keluarga Yu dengan belati terbangnya.

programme.title: The Mermaid
programme.desc: Zhang dan putri Jin yang bernama Peony sudah bertunangan sejak lahir, tetapi Jin menolak pertunangan tersebut. Kemudian, Zhang bertemu dengan sesosok roh yang terlihat persis seperti Peony dan mereka jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Swordswomen Three
programme.desc: Pada awal tiga dekade, Shen Yi, Essie Lin Chia, dan Pan Ying-tzu menampilkan superstar internasional Shaw yang pertama, Lo Lieh untuk Han Family Sword memberikan suguhan bintang empat untuk penggemar film laga ini.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Inilah kisah tentang kepolosan dan kegembiraan masa-masa remaja. Dua sahabat tumbuh bersama, namun persaingan muncul ketika mereka mengenal pria!

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Aksi kepahlawanan dan kisah asmara mewarnai film seni bela diri klasik ini. Saat Shaolin dikhianati oleh Pertapa Alis Putih, Fong Sai Yuk sang prajurit pemarah bersumpah untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Love Without End
programme.desc: Penyanyi Qing Qing dan arsitek Tang Peng Nan adalah pasangan serasi. Ia mengorbankan dirinya untuk membantu Peng Nan pada saat keluarganya mengalami kesulitan. Namun, mereka putus karena kesalahpahaman.

programme.title: Five Elements Ninjas
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda ahli bela diri merencanakan aksi balas dendam terhadap seorang ninja yang telah membunuh guru dan saudara seperguruannya.

programme.title: The Enchanting Ghost
programme.desc: Saat seorang pemuda dan kekasihnya terpisah selamanya akibat ulah sang paman dan temannya, gadis itu pun terdorong untuk bunuh diri. Namun, arwah sang gadis muncul kembali untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Killer Constable
programme.desc: Ketua Pengadilan Chan Koon Tai sungguh berdedikasi. Loyalitasnya yang berlebihan membuatnya mengejar seorang pencuri sadis yang bertekad untuk menghabisi anak buah Chan.

programme.title: Beyond The Great Wall
programme.desc: Wang Zhao Jun tak mau menyuap seorang pelukis kekaisaran sehingga si pelukis menggambar potret jelek dirinya, yang membuatnya tak dipilih oleh Kaisar sampai mereka bertemu langsung.

programme.title: Murderer Pursues
programme.desc: Danny Lee berperan sebagai pria yang dikira sebagai pengungsi dan dibuntuti oleh seorang polisi jujur dalam film kejahatan menarik asal Tiongkok-Vietnam arahan aktor yang kini menjadi sutradara, Wang Chung.

programme.title: Gangster, The Cop, The Devil
programme.desc: Detektif Lin membentuk unit khusus untuk menangkap perampok motor dan sindikat di balik aksi pencurian di Foshan usai istrinya yang hamil ditabrak oleh perampok motor.

programme.title: Open The Coffin
programme.desc: Sebuah film misteri supranatural dengan seorang detektif yang menyelidiki pembunuhan yang tampaknya merupakan akibat dari kutukan.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: Kisah tentang pengalaman imigran ilegal dari Tiongkok daratan yang berhasil sampai ke Hong Kong untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: Seorang pengusaha serakah dari Hong Kong menyewa seorang pemburu muda untuk menangkap gorila raksasa yang konon hidup jauh di dalam hutan India. Pemburu itu menemukan kera tersebut, dan hidup bersamanya ia menemukan seorang wanita liar yang telah berteman dengan makhluk itu.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Seluruh sekolah disandera saat kompetisi pidato bahasa Inggris berlangsung. Ip Man pun memutuskan untuk bangkit dan menghadapi krisis, serta menemukan bahwa dalangnya adalah sang guru dan teman masa kecilnya.

programme.title: Love Is Love
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri miskin, Shui dan Ti, berusaha membangun kehidupan mereka sendiri. Dan melalui kerja keras mereka berdua, Shui menjadi seorang eksekutif pemasaran, kemudian sikapnya mulai berubah.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang pemadam kebakaran yang rela menerjang bahaya dan mempertaruhkan nyawanya demi menyelamatkan orang lain. Akan tetapi, apakah ia memiliki keberanian untuk menghadapi masalah pribadinya?

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: Wong Fei-Hung adalah seorang pemuda yang nakal namun saleh, tetapi setelah serangkaian insiden, ayahnya yang frustrasi menyuruh seorang guru bela diri mabuk untuk mendisiplinkannya.

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang sopir taksi Hong Kong berubah mengerikan setelah secara tidak sengaja menabrak seorang penyihir dengan taksinya. Dia memutuskan untuk meminta bantuan penyihir tersebut untuk membalikkan kutukan kepada musuh-musuhnya dengan mengorbankan nyawanya sendiri.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembalap ingin membuktikan kelihaiannya dalam sebuah balapan, tapi ia malah melukai rekan setimnya, Lily. Dapatkah tim mereka kembali berjaya kala seorang juara balap mobil virtual bergabung di tim?

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: Seorang biksu ulung berusaha melindungi seorang dokter muda yang naif dari iblis ular berusia seribu tahun. Pertarungan kekuatan psikis berujung pada kekacauan.

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: Seorang biksu ulung berusaha melindungi seorang dokter muda yang naif dari iblis ular berusia seribu tahun. Pertarungan kekuatan psikis berujung pada kekacauan.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing dan kakaknya, Ma Tai Chueng, tiba di Shanghai untuk mencari peruntungan. Berteman dengan seorang gangster berkuasa, ia diberi klub malam sebagai imbalan atas penyelamatan nyawa Tam Sei. Sayangnya, seorang gangster lain juga menginginkan wilayah tersebut.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agen Wen ditugaskan untuk menyamar sebagai pedagang senjata militer di Asia Tenggara guna menemukan beberapa amunisi dan menghancurkannya. Namun, ia diserang oleh gangster tak dikenal saat menemukan amunisi tersebut.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: Marbles, seorang anak berusia 10 tahun, menyaksikan pembunuhan seorang wanita muda.

programme.title: Let's Have A Baby
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah menarik tentang kerumitan dalam menciptakan anak, yang menampilkan penampilan komedi langka oleh Alex Man Chi Leung.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng adalah seorang petarung jalanan yang memutuskan untuk hidup di Kowloon Walled City. Ia terlibat dalam perkelahian dan konspirasi. Saat temannya diburu oleh geng triad, Neng harus menyelamatkan temannya.

programme.title: Mr. Possessed
programme.desc: Riley diberi kemampuan untuk menahan godaan dari lawan jenis namun hal itu menjadi beban ketika ia hendak menikahi kekasihnya.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Seorang aktor berusaha meyakinkan sesosok wanita untuk berperan sebagai Samantha dalam film Bewitched yang dibuat ulang. Namun, ia tidak menyadari bila wanita itu ternyata benar-benar seorang penyihir!

programme.title: The Case Of Disappearances
programme.desc: Ketika Qing Cheng masih remaja, ia diserang oleh monster mutan yang tidak dikenal dan kehilangan keluarga serta ingatannya. Ia dianggap oleh penduduk desa sebagai orang yang tidak menyenangkan yang akan membawa bencana.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Petinju dunia kriminal, Lin Feng, diburu oleh triad asal Bangkok kala ia menolak bertarung dalam sebuah pertandingan ilegal. Lin Feng berhasil melarikan diri, tetapi ia kehilangan ingatannya.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: Seorang Pendeta Taois tidak senang ketika rekan Pendeta Buddha-nya pindah ke sebelah rumahnya. Mereka sering terlibat perselisihan dan duel, tetapi segera harus mengatasi masalah mereka ketika seorang vampir keluar dari peti matinya dan mendatangkan malapetaka di pedesaan.

programme.title: Law Or Justice
programme.desc: Seorang model (Joey Wong) diperkosa oleh seorang fotografer (Wilson Lam). Sementara itu, ia berselisih dengan sahabatnya (Carol Cheng) karena pacarnya (Alex Man), seorang polisi.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Mantan kapten SWAT, Dong Gu, menderita kehilangan penglihatan traumatis kala gagal menjalankan misi. Namun, musuh bebuyutannya muncul dan membuat putrinya dalam bahaya. Ia pun harus berjuang menyelamatkan putrinya.

programme.title: Girl With The Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: Lily, adalah seorang gadis biasa yang menjalani kehidupan sederhana. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah pasar antik, dia menemukan sepasang sepatu kaca berlian yang indah. Tanpa disangka, sepatu ini ternyata memiliki kekuatan magis yang dapat mewujudkan impian dan memberikan keberuntungan. Ketika Lily mencoba sepatu tersebut, dia segera menemukan bahwa hidupnya mulai berubah drastis. Dia mendapatkan pekerjaan impiannya, bertemu dengan orang-orang penting, dan bahkan menarik perhatian seorang pangeran modern yang tampan.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: Dunia berada dalam kekacauan setelah pohon kehidupan dibakar. Sun Wu Kong pun memutuskan untuk kembali ke masa lalu guna menghidupkannya kembali, tetapi kekuatannya tak stabil usai dirinya kehilangan ikat kepala emas.

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. B, yang memiliki nama lengkap Benjamin Barker, adalah seorang pegawai kantoran yang menjalani kehidupan monoton. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah insiden aneh di laboratorium ilmiah tempat temannya bekerja, Mr. B terpapar dengan zat misterius yang memberinya kemampuan untuk terbang. Awalnya, dia merasa bingung dan takut, tetapi segera dia mulai mengeksplorasi kekuatan barunya dengan penuh semangat.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun adalah seorang ahli bela diri terampil yang bertarung untuk membalas dendam atas kematian sang kekasih dengan bantuan dari seorang pemimpin geng pengemis.

programme.title: Out Of The Dark
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tua tewas setelah terjatuh dari sebuah gedung dan arwahnya menghantui tempat tersebut. Merasa ketakutan, para penjaga keamanan setempat pun meminta bantuan Leo si pemburu hantu beserta asistennya.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Liang Pao-erh bergabung dengan Spinsters' Club yang riang ketika dia menemukan suaminya berselingkuh. Terlepas dari wajah bahagia yang ditampilkan oleh saudara perempuannya, di balik itu semua, masing-masing dari mereka diam-diam merindukan seorang pria dalam hidupnya.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Raja Kera bereinkarnasi dalam wujud bukan manusia sebagai Joker, seorang perampok jalanan yang tidak menyadari identitas aslinya dan fakta bahwa 500 tahun sebelumnya, dia dan tuannya, Biksu Panjang Umur, dihukum dan dipaksa untuk tetap menjadi manusia.

programme.title: The Illegal Immigrant
programme.desc: Film ini bercerita tentang seorang imigran gelap asal Tiongkok, Cheung Kwan-chow, dan perjalanannya di New York.

programme.title: The Bare-Footed Kid
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda tiba di kota untuk bekerja dengan teman mendiang sang ayah. Ketika toko pewarna mereka dibakar oleh seorang pemimpin geng setempat, ia memutuskan untuk melawan demi melindungi dan menyelamatkan toko.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang wanita berusia akhir dua puluhan yang menemukan kembali bakatnya dalam bertinju setelah lama absen. Secara tak terduga, ia bertemu dengan mantan pelatih tinjunya dan keduanya bekerja sama untuk membantunya mencapai babak final pertandingan tinju profesional.

programme.title: Face To Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu tewas dalam sebuah kecelakaan ski. Kemudian, teman sekamarnya, Yoshio, menikahi istrinya serta mewarisi seluruh kekayaannya. Namun, segalanya berubah sejak Yoshio bertemu seorang pria tua di pemakaman Tamotsu.

programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; namun, segera terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya

programme.title: The Rendezvous
programme.desc: Seorang dokter keturunan Yahudi-Amerika dan seorang pegawai Departemen Luar Negeri yang beragama Islam mendapati diri mereka terjebak dalam sebuah konspirasi yang berpotensi memicu kiamat. Dengan waktu yang semakin menipis, mereka pun menjalankan misi untuk mengungkap misteri tersebut dan menyelamatkan dunia.

programme.title: Escape From Planet Earth
programme.desc: Astronaut Scorch Supernova terjebak dalam jebakan saat ia menanggapi sinyal SOS dari planet alien yang terkenal berbahaya.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Anna Wintour
programme.desc: Mulai dari kata yang paling tidak disukainya dalam dunia mode hingga alasan mengapa ia selalu mengenakan kacamata hitam Chanel, Pemimpin Redaksi Vogue membagikan 73 hal yang membuatnya menjadi Anna Wintour.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Esther Perel
programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Gigi Hadid
programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: Beyond Existence
programme.desc: Ellen, seorang agen pemerintah mengikuti perintah untuk mencari dan menghancurkan seorang profesor yang telah memperdagangkan informasi pemerintah ke wilayah asing. Namun, dalam sebuah putaran takdir, nyawa sang Profesor selamat, dan pasangan yang tidak mungkin bertemu ini menemukan diri mereka dalam perjalanan darat melalui lanskap tandus Inggris.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: Moon Rock For Monday
programme.desc: On learning about a huge gathering of organised crime families in upstate New York, the FBI and the police attempt to track their movements in order to take them into custody.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: The Lost Girls
programme.desc: Seperti nenek dan ibunya, Jane, yang mendahuluinya, Wendy harus melepaskan diri dari cengkeraman Pan dan janji yang dia ingin dia tepati.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil didampingi sahabat setianya, Redmond, aktor yang pernah dinominasikan untuk Emmy ini berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan ayahnya, kecintaannya pada Jepang, serta betapa ia (dengan bangga) menikmati segelas cosmopolitan dengan es batu

The Essex Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part documentary series. Easter Sunday, 2023 - a wealthy couple in their 60s are found dead by their daughter on Mersea Island in Essex. Carol and Stephen Baxter are in their armchairs with no sign of a struggle as police rule out carbon monoxide poisoning - when Senior Investigating Officer Lydia George and her team discover a mysterious will that leaves everything to the Baxters' daughter Ellena and their family friend Luke D'Wit, the detectives find out that D'Wit was helping Carol as a carer as her health slowly deteriorated. Carol was closely following the advice of a mysterious American doctor promising to cure her thyroid condition - as a postmortem reveals that the couple had lethal levels of antihistamine and fentanyl in their systems, Ellena and Luke are arrested on suspicion of murder as detectives search for answers.

programme.title: TikTok: Murder Gone Viral
programme.desc: With exclusive access to the victims' families, friends and the police, this documentary strand explores extraordinary true crime cases linked to the world's fastest-growing social media platform. In the early hours of the 11th of February 2022, two 21-year-old men - Saqib Hussain and Hashim Ijazuddin - were found dead in a burning car on the A46 in Leicestershire. Within a short time, police arrested two unlikely culprits: 22-year-old TikTok influencer Mahek Bukhari and her 45-year-old mother Ansreen. Mahek from Stoke-on-Trent has over 160,000 followers on TikTok and many millions of views - her mum Ansreen regularly appeared in her videos. Detectives discovered that Ansreen had been in a three-year-long secret relationship with Saqib Hussain which began when he was just 18 - when she wanted to end the relationship in January 2022 and Saqib threatened to send nude photos and sex tapes to her husband, Mahek hatched a plan to silence him and enlisted others into her scheme.

programme.title: Unbelievable Moments Caught On Camera
programme.desc: Unbelievable, shocking and uplifting viral videos filmed all over the world and narrated by award-winning actor Roger Allam. Go behind the lens to hear firsthand accounts of these once-in-a-lifetime experiences, starting in Arizona where two first responders happened to be in the right place at the right time to rescue a woman trapped in an inferno. In the mountains of East Asia, one intrepid traveller captures a once-in-a-lifetime experience on camera, while in Yorkshire, a commuter has a very close brush with death. Heading down under, we meet lifelong friends and fishermen who nearly became bait after their boat sank, and back in the UK, one toddler comes to her dad's rescue in the most remarkable way. Finally, we meet a family whose US road trip was crashed by a furry friend. All stories you wouldn't believe if they weren't caught on camera.

programme.desc: Brazil take on Haiti in their second game of the FIFA 2026 World Cup, with Mark Pougatch alongside Emma Hayes and Karen Carney. [S,HD]
